signals: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.2 y 5.3 Codex acelera la adopción de modelos agénticos sobre infraestructura NVIDIA GB200.
Escasez estructural de capacidad 2nm en TSMC genera cuellos de botella críticos para el hardware de IA de vanguardia.
La transición a diseños multi-die se consolida como estándar ante los límites físicos del silicio tradicional.
Iniciativas de soberanía IA en Reino Unido impulsan el despliegue de superordenadores exaflop como Isambard-AI.
Herramientas agénticas de Siemens automatizan la verificación de chips, acelerando drásticamente el ciclo de diseño.
risks: Concentración extrema del suministro avanzado de semiconductores en TSMC frente a la lenta competencia de Intel.
Creciente demanda energética de datacenters que exige infraestructuras eléctricas dedicadas según estrategia de xAI.
Límites físicos y económicos del escalado monolítico que fuerzan arquitecturas multi-die más complejas.
watch: Disponibilidad real de sistemas Blackwell GB200 para el entrenamiento de los próximos modelos de OpenAI.
Hitos de producción de Intel 18A como alternativa viable al monopolio de fabricación de 2nm de TSMC.
Integración de arquitecturas unificadas sensor-to-action en el ecosistema de vehículos autónomos de NVIDIA.

items.title: Global 2nm Supply Crunch: TSMC Leads as Intel 18A, Samsung, and Rapidus Race to Compete
items.summary: The semiconductor industry is in the midst of a structural supply challenge that’s tightly coupled to exploding demand for advanced chips, especially those used in AI, HPC, and next-generation mobile and consumer devices. At the center of this vortex is the 2nm class of manufacturing technology, representing one of the most … Read More The post Global 2nm Supply Crunch: TSMC Leads as Intel 18A, Samsung, and Rapidus Race to Compete appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: El cuello de botella en 2nm define la disponibilidad y coste futuro del hardware crítico para IA.

items.title: As AI Grows More Complex, Model Builders Rely on NVIDIA
items.summary: Unveiling what it describes as the most capable model series yet for professional knowledge work, OpenAI launched GPT-5.2 in December. The model was trained and deployed on NVIDIA infrastructure, including NVIDIA Hopper and GB200 NVL72 systems. GPT-5.3 Codex — the first OpenAI agentic coding model to help build itself — was released in February and […]
items.why: El lanzamiento de GPT-5.2 y el primer modelo agéntico (5.3) marca un hito en productividad y desarrollo de software.

items.title: Reducing Risk Early: Multi-Die Design Feasibility Exploration
items.summary: The semiconductor industry is entering a new era in system design. As traditional monolithic scaling approaches its economic and physical limits, multi-die architectures are emerging as a primary pathway for delivering continued improvements in performance, power efficiency, and integration density. By distributing … Read More The post Reducing Risk Early: Multi-Die Design Feasibility Exploration appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Cambio fundamental en arquitectura de chips para superar los límites físicos del escalado de silicio tradicional.

items.title: xAI is committed to deploying artificial intelligence that makes the lives of people better as well as adding more power near our datacenters to reduce the c...
items.summary: xAI is committed to deploying artificial intelligence that makes the lives of people better as well as adding more power near our datacenters to reduce the cost of energy for the American people Quote The White House @WhiteHouse Mar 4 President Trump Participates in a Roundtable on Ratepayer Protection Pledge x.com/i/broadcasts/1
items.why: Enfoque estratégico en la soberanía energética y reducción de costes operativos para grandes datacenters.

items.title: Siemens Reveals Agentic Questa
items.summary: There’s no denying that verification now leads the field in agentic AI announcements, accelerating the trend around this significant contribution to design automation. Siemens have just announced their Questa One Agentic Toolkit, their response to this trend, building on the core Questa One platform. Questa One provides … Read More The post Siemens Reveals Agentic Questa appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Aplicación de IA agéntica para automatizar la verificación crítica, acelerando la producción de hardware.

items.title: NVIDIA Releases New AI Models and Developer Tools to Advance Autonomous Vehicle Ecosystem
items.summary: Autonomous vehicle (AV) stacks are evolving from many distinct models to a unified, end-to-end architecture that executes driving actions directly from sensor data. This transition to using larger models is drastically increasing the demand for high-quality, physically based sensor data for training, testing and validation. To help accelerate the development of next-generation AV architectures, NVIDIA […]
items.why: Transición hacia arquitecturas unificadas en conducción autónoma que demandan datos masivos y físicos.

items.title: Isambard-AI, the UK’s Most Powerful AI Supercomputer, Goes Live
items.summary: The University of Bristol’s Isambard-AI, powered by NVIDIA Grace Hopper Superchips, delivers 21 exaflops of AI performance, making it the fastest system in the U.K. and among the most energy-efficient globally.
items.why: Despliegue de 21 exaflops de rendimiento IA posiciona al Reino Unido en la élite de supercomputación.

items.title: NVIDIA Research Shapes Physical AI
items.summary: AI and graphics research breakthroughs in neural rendering, 3D generation and world simulation power robotics, autonomous vehicles and content creation.
items.why: Avances en simulación de mundos y renderizado cierran la brecha entre IA digital y aplicaciones físicas.

items.title: Reaching Across the Isles: UK-LLM Brings AI to UK Languages With NVIDIA Nemotron
items.summary: Celtic languages — including Cornish, Irish, Scottish Gaelic and Welsh — are the U.K.’s oldest living languages. To empower their speakers, the UK-LLM sovereign AI initiative is building an AI model based on NVIDIA Nemotron that can reason in both English and Welsh, a language spoken by about 850,000 people in Wales today. Enabling high-quality […]
items.why: Iniciativa de soberanía tecnológica que aplica IA a lenguajes regionales sobre infraestructura Nemotron.

items.title: Innovation to Impact: How NVIDIA Research Fuels Transformative Work in AI, Graphics and Beyond
items.summary: The roots of many of NVIDIA’s landmark innovations — the foundational technology that powers AI, accelerated computing, real-time ray tracing and seamlessly connected data centers — can be found in the company’s research organization, a global team of around 400 experts in fields including computer architecture, generative AI, graphics and robotics. Established in 2006 and […]
items.why: Estructura de investigación global que sustenta las innovaciones en computación acelerada de NVIDIA.

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.why: Capacidad de generación musical integrada en Gemini que amplía el alcance creativo multimodal.

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: A screen capture of Project Genie, an experimental interface showing a grid of circular images, many of which appear to be 360-degree views, with a large, central black globe labeled Create your own
items.why: Experimentación en generación de mundos 3D interactivos mediante interfaces de lenguaje natural.

items.summary: NVIDIA GauGAN2, a powerful [#AI](https://x.com/hashtag/AI?src=hashtag_click) model that allows anyone to convert simple written phrases like "ocean waves" into a photorealistic masterpiece. items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.why: Mejoras incrementales en traducción mediante mayor contexto y funciones interactivas de IA.

items.title: Applications Now Open for $60,000 NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Awards
items.summary: Bringing together the world’s brightest minds and the latest accelerated computing technology leads to powerful breakthroughs that help tackle some of the biggest research problems. To foster such innovation, the NVIDIA Graduate Fellowship Program provides grants, mentors and technical support to doctoral students doing outstanding research relevant to NVIDIA technologies. The program, in its 25th […]
items.why: Inversión en talento académico para asegurar la próxima generación de investigadores en computación acelerada.
